description:
Core run-level observability dashboard for test quality monitoring using InfluxDB v1.
Designed for aggregated metrics per run (no per-test storage).

options.content:
# Last run in selected timeframe
---
Metrics for the most recent test run observed within the selected time range.

targets.query:
Select * from (
  SELECT LAST("duration_ms") AS "duration_ms"
  FROM "$measurement"
  WHERE "env" =~ /^$env$/ AND $timeFilter
  GROUP BY "env"
)
order by time desc
limit 1

SELECT LAST("duration_ms") AS "duration_ms"
FROM "$measurement"
WHERE "env" =~ /^$env$/ AND $timeFilter
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1

panels.description: Last passrate for the full run (app=__all__, suite=all).

targets.query: SELECT "passrate" FROM "$measurement" WHERE ("app"='__all__' AND "suite"='all' AND "env" =~ /^$env$/  AND "run_id" = '$run_id_timeframe' AND $timeFilter)
SELECT last("tests_total") FROM "$measurement" WHERE ("app"='__all__' AND "suite"='all' AND "env" =~ /^$env$/ AND "run_id" = '$run_id_timeframe' AND $timeFilter)
SELECT last("tests_total") FROM "$measurement" WHERE ("app"='__all__' AND "suite"='all' AND "env" =~ /^$env$/ AND "run_id" = '$run_id_timeframe' AND $timeFilter)
SELECT last("tests_skipped") FROM "$measurement" WHERE ("app"='__all__' AND "suite"='all' AND "env" =~ /^$env$/ AND "run_id" = '$run_id_timeframe' AND $timeFilter)
SELECT last("tests_passed") FROM "$measurement" WHERE ("app"='__all__' AND "suite"='all' AND "env" =~ /^$env$/ AND "run_id" = '$run_id_timeframe' AND $timeFilter)
SELECT last("tests_failed") FROM "$measurement" WHERE ("app"='__all__' AND "suite"='all' AND "env" =~ /^$env$/ AND "run_id" = '$run_id_timeframe' AND $timeFilter)
SELECT last("tests_skipped") FROM "$measurement" WHERE ("app"='__all__' AND "suite"='all' AND "env" =~ /^$env$/ AND "run_id" = '$run_id_timeframe' AND $timeFilter)

panels.description: Total time consumption with parallel execution

targets.query:
SELECT last("duration_ms")
FROM "$measurement"
WHERE "app"='__all__' AND "suite"='all' AND "env" =~ /^$env$/ AND "run_id" = '$run_id_timeframe' AND $timeFilter

SELECT SUM("duration_ms")
FROM "$measurement"
WHERE "env" =~ /^$env$/
  AND "run_id" = '$run_id_timeframe'
  AND "suite" != 'all'
  AND $timeFilter

SELECT SUM("tests_total")
FROM "$measurement"
WHERE "env" =~ /^$env$/
  AND "run_id" = '$run_id_timeframe'
  AND "suite" != 'all'
  AND $timeFilter

SELECT SUM("tests_skipped")
FROM "$measurement"
WHERE "env" =~ /^$env$/
  AND "run_id" = '$run_id_timeframe'
  AND "suite" != 'all'
  AND $timeFilter

options.content:
# Recent runs
---
Chronological view of recent test runs to monitor stability and execution trends over time.

targets.query: SELECT * FROM "$measurement" WHERE "app" = '__all__' AND "env" =~ /^$env$/ GROUP BY "run_id" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 20

options.content:
# Absolute last run
---
Aggregated metrics for the most recent completed test run in the selected environment.
Independent of the selected time range.

targets.query:
Select * from (
  SELECT LAST("duration_ms") AS "duration_ms"
  FROM "$measurement"
  WHERE "env" =~ /^$env$/
  GROUP BY "env"
)
order by time desc
limit 1

SELECT LAST("duration_ms") AS "duration_ms"
FROM "$measurement"
WHERE "env" =~ /^$env$/
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1

panels.description: Last passrate for the full run (app=__all__, suite=all).

targets.query: SELECT last("passrate") FROM "$measurement" WHERE ("app"='__all__' AND "suite"='all' AND "env" =~ /^$env$/  AND "run_id" = '$run_id_absolute')
SELECT last("passrate") AS passrate FROM "$measurement" WHERE ("app"='__all__' AND "suite"='all' AND "env" =~ /^$env$/  AND "run_id" = '$run_id_absolute') GROUP BY "env"
SELECT last("passrate") AS "passrate_previous" FROM "$measurement" WHERE ("app"='__all__' AND "suite"='all' AND "env" =~ /^$env$/  AND "run_id" = '$run_id_previous') GROUP By "env"

panels.description: Total time consumption with parallel execution

targets.query:
SELECT last("tests_total")
FROM "$measurement"
WHERE "app"='__all__' AND "suite"='all' AND "env" =~ /^$env$/  AND "run_id" = '$run_id_absolute'

panels.description: Total time consumption with parallel execution

targets.query:
SELECT last("tests_total")
FROM "$measurement"
WHERE "app"='__all__' AND "suite"='all' AND "env" =~ /^$env$/  AND "run_id" = '$run_id_absolute'

SELECT last("tests_skipped")
FROM "$measurement"
WHERE "app"='__all__' AND "suite"='all' AND "env" =~ /^$env$/  AND "run_id" = '$run_id_absolute'
SELECT last("tests_passed") FROM "$measurement" WHERE ("app"='__all__' AND "suite"='all' AND "env" =~ /^$env$/  AND "run_id" = '$run_id_absolute')
SELECT last("tests_failed") FROM "$measurement" WHERE ("app"='__all__' AND "suite"='all' AND "env" =~ /^$env$/   AND "run_id" = '$run_id_absolute')
SELECT last("tests_skipped") FROM "$measurement" WHERE ("app"='__all__' AND "suite"='all' AND "env" =~ /^$env$/  AND "run_id" = '$run_id_absolute')

panels.description: Total time consumption with parallel execution

targets.query:
SELECT last("duration_ms")
FROM "$measurement"
WHERE "app"='__all__' AND "suite"='all' AND "env" =~ /^$env$/  AND "run_id" = '$run_id_absolute'

SELECT last("duration_ms") AS "duration"
FROM "$measurement"
WHERE "app"='__all__' AND "suite"='all' AND "env" =~ /^$env$/  AND "run_id" = '$run_id_absolute'
GROUP By "env"

SELECT last("duration_ms") AS "duration_previous"
FROM "$measurement"
WHERE "app"='__all__' AND "suite"='all' AND "env" =~ /^$env$/  AND "run_id" = '$run_id_previous'
GROUP BY "env"

SELECT SUM("duration_ms")
FROM "$measurement"
WHERE "env" =~ /^$env$/
  AND "run_id" = '$run_id_absolute'
  AND "suite" != 'all'

SELECT SUM("tests_total")
FROM "$measurement"
WHERE "env" =~ /^$env$/
  AND "run_id" = '$run_id_absolute'
  AND "suite" != 'all'

SELECT SUM("tests_skipped")
FROM "$measurement"
WHERE "env" =~ /^$env$/
  AND "run_id" = '$run_id_absolute'
  AND "suite" != 'all'

SELECT SUM("duration_ms")
FROM "$measurement"
WHERE "env" =~ /^$env$/
  AND "run_id" = '$run_id_absolute'
  AND "suite" != 'all'

SELECT SUM("tests_total")
FROM "$measurement"
WHERE "env" =~ /^$env$/
  AND "run_id" = '$run_id_absolute'
  AND "suite" != 'all'

SELECT SUM("tests_skipped")
FROM "$measurement"
WHERE "env" =~ /^$env$/
  AND "run_id" = '$run_id_absolute'
  AND "suite" != 'all'

SELECT SUM("duration_ms")
FROM "$measurement"
WHERE "env" =~ /^$env$/
  AND "run_id" = '$run_id_previous'
  AND "suite" != 'all'

SELECT SUM("tests_total")
FROM "$measurement"
WHERE "env" =~ /^$env$/
  AND "run_id" = '$run_id_previous'
  AND "suite" != 'all'

SELECT SUM("tests_skipped")
FROM "$measurement"
WHERE "env" =~ /^$env$/
  AND "run_id" = '$run_id_previous'
  AND "suite" != 'all'

options.content:
# Trends over time
---
Each data point represents one completed test run in the selected environment.

targets.query: SELECT mean("passrate") FROM "$measurement" WHERE ("app"='__all__' AND "suite"='all' AND "env" =~ /^$env$/ AND $timeFilter) GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT mean("passrate") FROM "$measurement" WHERE ("app"='__all__' AND "suite"='critical' AND "env" =~ /^$env$/ AND $timeFilter) GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT mean("passrate") FROM "$measurement" WHERE ("app"='__all__' AND "suite"='regression' AND "env" =~ /^$env$/ AND $timeFilter) GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

SELECT mean("duration_ms")
FROM "$measurement"
WHERE "app" = '__all__'
  AND "suite"='all'
  AND "env" =~ /^$env$/
GROUP BY time($__interval)

SELECT MEAN("ms_per_test") AS "ms_per_test"
FROM (
  SELECT
    SUM("duration_ms") / (SUM("tests_total") - SUM("tests_skipped")) AS "ms_per_test"
  FROM "$measurement"
  WHERE "env" =~ /^$env$/
    AND "suite" != 'all'
    AND "app"  != '__all__'
    AND $timeFilter
  GROUP BY "run_id"
)
GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT mean("tests_total") FROM "$measurement" WHERE ("app"='__all__' AND "suite"='all' AND "env" =~ /^$env$/ AND $timeFilter) GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

options.content:
# Breakdown by suite
---
Aggregated metrics per test suite for the most recent completed run.

targets.query:
SELECT
  SUM("tests_passed")   AS "Passed",
  SUM("tests_failed")  AS "Failed",
  SUM("tests_skipped")  AS "Skipped",
  SUM("duration_ms")    AS "Duration"
FROM "$measurement"
WHERE
"env" =~ /^$env$/
  AND "run_id" = '$run_id_absolute'
  AND "suite" != '__all__'
  AND "suite" != 'all'
GROUP BY "suite"

SELECT
  SUM("duration_ms") AS "duration_ms"
FROM "$measurement"
WHERE
  "env" =~ /^$env$/
  AND "run_id" = '$run_id_absolute'
  AND "suite" != '__all__'
  AND "suite" != 'all'
GROUP BY "suite"

defaults.noValue: 👌 All good here. There was no failures during the run.

targets.query:
SELECT
  SUM("tests_failed") AS "failures"
FROM "$measurement"
WHERE
  "env" =~ /^$env$/
  AND "run_id" = '$run_id_absolute'
  AND "suite" != '__all__'
  AND "suite" != 'all'
GROUP BY "suite"

options.content:
# Breakdown by app
---
Metrics aggregated per application for the most recent completed run.

targets.query:
SELECT
  SUM("tests_passed")   AS "Passed",
  SUM("tests_failed")  AS "Failed",
  SUM("tests_skipped")  AS "Skipped",
  SUM("duration_ms")    AS "Duration"
FROM "$measurement"
WHERE
"env" =~ /^$env$/
  AND "run_id" = '$run_id_absolute'
  AND "suite" != '__all__'
  AND "suite" != 'all'
GROUP BY "domain"

SELECT
  SUM("duration_ms") AS "duration_ms"
FROM "$measurement"
WHERE
  "env" =~ /^$env$/
  AND "run_id" = '$run_id_absolute'
  AND "suite" != '__all__'
  AND "suite" != 'all'
GROUP BY "domain"

defaults.noValue: 👌 All good here. There was no failures during the run.

targets.query:
SELECT
  SUM("tests_failed") AS "failures"
FROM "$measurement"
WHERE
  "env" =~ /^$env$/
  AND "run_id" = '$run_id_absolute'
  AND "suite" != '__all__'
  AND "suite" != 'all'
GROUP BY "domain"

options.content:
# Breakdown by domain (all suites)
---
Aggregated metrics per functional domain for the most recent completed run.

Durations represent cumulative test execution time across all suites.

targets.query:
SELECT
  SUM("tests_passed")   AS "Passed",
  SUM("tests_failed")  AS "Failed",
  SUM("tests_skipped")  AS "Skipped",
  SUM("duration_ms")    AS "Duration"
FROM "$measurement"
WHERE
"env" =~ /^$env$/
  AND "run_id" = '$run_id_absolute'
  AND "suite" != '__all__'
  AND "suite" != 'all'
GROUP BY "app"

SELECT
  SUM("duration_ms") AS "duration_ms"
FROM "$measurement"
WHERE
  "env" =~ /^$env$/
  AND "run_id" = '$run_id_absolute'
  AND "suite" != '__all__'
  AND "suite" != 'all'
GROUP BY "app"

defaults.noValue: 👌 All good here. There was no failures during the run.

targets.query:
SELECT
  SUM("tests_failed") AS "failures"
FROM "$measurement"
WHERE
  "env" =~ /^$env$/
  AND "run_id" = '$run_id_absolute'
  AND "suite" != '__all__'
  AND "suite" != 'all'
GROUP BY "app"

list.definition: SELECT "run_id" FROM (SELECT "duration_ms" FROM "$measurement" WHERE "app"='__all__' AND "suite"='all' AND "env" =~ /^$env$/ GROUP BY "run_id"::tag) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
list.name: run_id_absolute

query.query: SELECT "run_id" FROM (SELECT "duration_ms" FROM "$measurement" WHERE "app"='__all__' AND "suite"='all' AND "env" =~ /^$env$/ GROUP BY "run_id"::tag) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

list.definition: SELECT "run_id" FROM (SELECT "duration_ms" FROM "$measurement" WHERE "app"='__all__' AND "suite"='all' AND "env" =~ /^$env$/ GROUP BY "run_id"::tag) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1
list.name: run_id_previous

query.query: SELECT "run_id" FROM (SELECT "duration_ms" FROM "$measurement" WHERE "app"='__all__' AND "suite"='all' AND "env" =~ /^$env$/ GROUP BY "run_id"::tag) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1

list.definition: SELECT "run_id" FROM (SELECT "duration_ms" FROM "$measurement" WHERE "app"='__all__' AND "suite"='all' AND "env" =~ /^$env$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "run_id"::tag) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
list.name: run_id_timeframe

query.query: SELECT "run_id" FROM (SELECT "duration_ms" FROM "$measurement" WHERE "app"='__all__' AND "suite"='all' AND "env" =~ /^$env$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "run_id"::tag) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

title: Test Quality Observability - Core Dashboard
